# command-palette

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Cmd+K command palette primitive. Plugins contribute commands via CommandPalette.Item; the dialog renders them with fuzzy search and keyboard navigation.
- Defines:
  - Slots: `CommandPalette.Item`
  - Commands: `CommandPaletteCommands.Open`, `CommandPaletteCommands.Toggle`
- Exports (web):
  - Types: `CommandPaletteItem`
  - Values: `CommandPalette`, `CommandPaletteCommands`
- Contributes:
  - `Core.Root` → `CommandPaletteRoot`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
